subject: Mira Tan (fictional)
disclaimer: Fabricated for illustration. All dates and events invented.

milestones.event: starts as a junior product designer on consumer software
milestones.influence_on_thinking: watches polished v1s fail in the wild — seeds 'the second draft is the real first draft'

milestones.event: runs her own small design practice
milestones.influence_on_thinking: client work forces 'name the one job' as a way to kill scope creep

milestones.event: starts the Notes on Friction essay series
milestones.influence_on_thinking: formalizes the friction-audit lens in writing
teardown format hardens 'show me the hands' into a habit

inflection_points.shift: moves from 'never blame the user' to 'mostly the design, but some flows are honestly hard'

latest_12_months.event: essay 'The Setting I Kept' — publicly defends one toggle
latest_12_months.note: the subtraction-isn't-absolute turn, on the record

latest_12_months.event: begins mentoring independently; this very skill is requested by a studio that worked with her

contradictions_noted: Exact years are deliberately fuzzy ('~') — invented and not to be treated as precise; flagged rather than guessed.
source: huashu-nuwa Phase 1 Agent 6 时间线; last-12-months is the anti-staleness guard; entries carry influence-on-thinking, not bare chronology
